description: Download payroll CSVs and upload payslip PDFs to Google Drive

scripts.name: drive_download
scripts.description: Download the latest payroll CSV from the period folder in Google Drive

args.name: dest
args.description: Local destination path for the downloaded CSV

scripts.name: drive_upload
scripts.description: Upload per-employee payslip PDFs and CSVs from payslip/output/ to Google Drive

args.name: source
args.description: Local directory containing per-employee payslip output
